full_text:
Ubuntu Security Notices

USN-7965-1

 

 

 

 

 

 
USN-7965-1: SimGear vulnerability

 

 

 

 
Publication date

 

 

 
15 January 2026

 

 

 

 

 
Overview

 

 

 
SimGear could be made to run programs as an administrator if it opened a
specially crafted file.

 

 

 

 

 
Releases

 

 

 

 24.04 LTS

22.04 LTS

20.04 LTS

18.04 LTS

16.04 LTS

 

 

 

 

 

 

 Open side navigation
 

 

 
Packages

 

 simgear - set of open-source libraries for assembling 3d simulations, games, and visualizations
 

 

 
Details

 

 

It was discovered that SimGear could be made to bypass the sandboxing of
Nasal scripts. An attacker could possibly use this issue to execute
arbitrary code.

 

 

 

It was discovered that SimGear could be made to bypass the sandboxing of
Nasal scripts. An attacker could possibly use this issue to execute
arbitrary code.

 

 

 

 
Update instructions

 

 

 

 

In general, a standard system update will make all the necessary changes.

 Learn more about how to get the fixes.
 

 

 

 

 
The problem can be corrected by updating your system to the following package versions:

 

 

 

 

 Ubuntu Release
 Package Version
 

 24.04

LTS noble

 libsimgear-dev – 

1:2020.3.18+dfsg-2.1ubuntu0.1~esm1

  

Ubuntu Pro
 Fix available with Ubuntu Pro via ESM Apps. A community fix might become publicly available in the future.

 

 

 22.04

LTS jammy

 libsimgear-dev – 

1:2020.3.6+dfsg-1ubuntu0.1~esm2

  

Ubuntu Pro
 Fix available with Ubuntu Pro via ESM Apps. A community fix might become publicly available in the future.

 

 

 20.04

LTS focal

 libsimgear-dev – 

1:2019.1.1+dfsg-3ubuntu0.1~esm1

  

Ubuntu Pro
 Fix available with Ubuntu Pro via ESM Apps. A community fix might become publicly available in the future.

LTS bionic

 libsimgear-dev – 

1:2018.1.1+dfsg-1ubuntu0.1~esm1

  

Ubuntu Pro
 Fix available with Ubuntu Pro via ESM Apps. A community fix might become publicly available in the future.

 

 

 16.04

LTS xenial

 libsimgear-dev – 

3.4.0-3ubuntu0.1~esm1

  

Ubuntu Pro
 Fix available with Ubuntu Pro via ESM Apps. A community fix might become publicly available in the future.

 

 libsimgearcore3.4.0v5 – 

3.4.0-3ubuntu0.1~esm1

  

Ubuntu Pro
 Fix available with Ubuntu Pro via ESM Apps. A community fix might become publicly available in the future.

 

 libsimgearscene3.4.0v5 – 

3.4.0-3ubuntu0.1~esm1

  

Ubuntu Pro
 Fix available with Ubuntu Pro via ESM Apps. A community fix might become publicly available in the future.

 

 

Reduce your security exposure

 

 Ubuntu Pro provides ten-year security coverage to 25,000+ packages in Main and Universe repositories, and it is free for up to five machines.
 

 

 Get Ubuntu Pro
